center.name: 休恩半岛
center.summary: 休恩半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Orange-billed lorikeet、Emperor bird-of-paradise、Wallace's fairywren等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Volume II | publisher = Dove Publications | location = Queensland | pages = 190–92 | isbn = 978-0-9590257-1-2 | oclc = 153651608 }} The black-sided robin is found across New Guinea from the Huon Peninsula west to the western limits of West Papua and West Papuan Islands, although is absent from the transfly region in the south

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is distributed in hill forests of the Huon Peninsula

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits forest canopy, forest edges, and cleared areas bordering forests at high elevations in mountains in the Central Range and the Huon Peninsula, but is absent from the Bird's Head Peninsula

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is common throughout New Guinea, except on the Huon Peninsula, eastern Sepik-Ramu, and most of the northern parts of the southeastern peninsula. The species inhabits foothill rainforest and secondary growth between elevations of , although they can be found up to elevations of and in lowland plains where there is suitable vegetation. It is typically found more in trees than in the undergrowth, most commonly from above the ground, but can be found from ground level to in the canopy

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The former inhabits the eastern portion of the New Guinea Highlands while the latter can be found in the Huon Peninsula
